narrative:
Claibourne Township has 2,303 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
